steps.title: Identify the dual requirements
steps.content: The amendment mandates two distinct requirements: presidential inaugurations on January 20, and senate/house members sworn in on January 3. The transition must show the second requirement is also mandated by this same amendment.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: ”In addition,” marks the second requirement as another mandate of the amendment. The other three suggest contrast, exemplification, or narrowing focus instead of showing coordination. That matches choice D — D is correct.
